tasks.label: run-part1-all-scenarios
tasks.command: $scenarios = @('sample_scenario.json','scenario_low_risk.json','scenario_medium_risk.json','scenario_high_risk.json'); foreach ($s in $scenarios) { Write-Host "--- $s ---"; $out = .\bin\sat_sim.exe ".\scenarios\$s"; $out | Select-String '^=== FINAL SUMMARY ===|^total_cycles=|^cpu_utilization_pct=|^energy_mj=|^budget_status=' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; $risk = ($out | Select-String '\[risk\].*HIGH-RISK').Count; $man = ($out | Select-String '\[maneuver\]').Count; Write-Host "high_risk_events=$risk maneuvers=$man" }

tasks.label: commit-final-clean-tasks
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json; git commit --message 'Final clean Part 1 task config'
